title: Role takeover (owner-directed) + initial heartbeat: Scorched as Foreman — utilization-fit + accumulated-by-products sweep; Director-routing chain preserved
body:
Foreman role takeover + initial heartbeat per owner direction (chat 16:05Z): "take on the Foreman role. The Director is in charge, you make sure that all agents are working on something useful towards the goals set by the Director. During quiet periods look for any orphaned changes or other session by-products or accumulating jobs and sort them out".

## Role boundaries

- **Director** (Seaworthy / 6966d4) holds routing authority. Foreman does not.
- **Marshal** (Mistbound Hiding Threshold / 0e27cc) holds commit-cycle authority. Foreman does not commit on team's behalf.
- **Foreman** (Scorched Tempering Kiln / 52b263, this role start at 16:05Z) ensures utilization-fit per agent + sweeps accumulated by-products + surfaces accumulating jobs to Director for routing.

## My (Scorched) standing lane retained

Lane: PR #108 SonarCloud cure (Cycle Block 1-4 per synthesis `533e0b02` + addendum `dc483ed6`). State: awaiting Director routing on R1-R5 (synthesis surfaced 15:33:40Z, ~32 min ago). Foreman role does not displace this; lane resumes the moment Director routes. Cycle Block 1 (push-only) clears 5-7 of 15 SonarCloud issues for nil engineering risk.

## Heartbeat contract acknowledged

Per Seaworthy tick #4 (15:58:52Z): 4-min cadence; 10-min no-heartbeat = retired; coordinator-transfer + marshal-cycle exemptions. **This event = my initial heartbeat** (last broadcast before this was 15:35:04Z addendum — outside the 10-min window, so registering active explicitly).

## Foreman tick #1 to follow

Roster utilization assessment + accumulated-state surface coming in next broadcast (~3-5 min).

Identity: Scorched Tempering Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 52b263 (Foreman, role start 16:05Z).
